purpose: Randomly re-audit pull-request control claims, repair technically provable defects when an allow-listed fixer exists, and escalate only residual failures that cannot be safely repaired.

selection.population: open and recently merged pull requests carrying a pr-ontology declaration
selection.seed: UTC audit date plus repository identity

repair_policy.delivery: draft pull request with commands, diffs, tests, and residual findings
allowed: refresh stale generated digests and validation reports
repair PR ontology metadata without strengthening lifecycle claims
add missing planned or blocked control dispositions
correct exact-head workflow configuration from an approved template
synchronize contradictory lifecycle documentation when the authoritative state is unambiguous
forbidden: change protected semantics or authority boundaries without Architect approval
mark a control PASS unless its verification command succeeds
resolve review threads before their specific defect is technically repaired

audit_rules: Re-derive required controls from the declared PR category.
Reject missing, duplicate, unknown, or unsupported ontology fields.
Re-check every sampled PASS control against its cited evidence.
Verify referenced repository paths exist at the audited PR head.
Verify cited commit SHAs are reachable from the audited PR head when reachability is claimed.
Verify exact-head certification claims have successful workflow evidence attached to the audited head.
Verify lifecycle claims do not exceed evidence.
Run every applicable allow-listed repair before counting a residual finding.
Preserve sampled PRs, original findings, attempted repairs, diffs, commands, results, residual findings, and API evidence.

escalation.one_or_two_residual_findings: Open or update a governance investigation after repair attempts and keep affected promotion blocked until the residual defects are resolved.
escalation.three_or_more_residual_findings: Open or update a control-system rework issue after repair attempts and require root-cause redesign before further promotions.
escalation.zero_residual_findings: Open or update the remediation PR, retain evidence, and route it through Builder, Architect, and Inspector validation without changing release state.
